    seen = Set.new(String)
    segments = Array(String).new
    current = ""
    for c in s.chars

            segments.add(current)
            current = ""
    end
    return segments
end

def solve(s : String) : Array(String)
  existing = Set.new(String)

        segments.append(current)
        start = i + 1
        break
      else
        i += 1
    end
  end

end
